comment.body: A person i know working in germany -- saying this "Most of the technology that flew to China is not just from the US, they are mostly from Germany and Switzerland. I have had first hand knowledge on scopes, electronics and auto electric components they use. Chinese learned a lot from the EU tech. If a US or EU servo control and controller costs $250, Chinese cost $100, for the same performance, and they will have EU chip controllers such as STI micro electronics inside. The way they got these technologies, over produce and manipulating currency is beyond anyone. EU will try to gain short term cushion if things go bad with the US. And that will have long term implications for the US as well."

comment.body:
One interesting datapoint : 
Chinese saves ~45% of their GDP(18T), vs American saves ~15% of GDP( 28T)… and ~50% of American’s wealth is in stock, the # is only 10% for Chinese…

This shows a big difference in pain tolerance ..
